unschool-discoveries

file structure in progress

unschool-pages bundle.css /css /images /_includes layout.html /_site @11ty/eleventy --serve (( auto generated created )) /assets style.css /lab lab.json *.md /unschooling unschooling.json *.md /index.md *.md (landing pages for blog sections) sitemap.xml robot.txt

Software engineering goals

  • Build and extend neo web language library and code samples with completes works for clients and ventures
  • Hugo for marketing and landing site
  • 11thy for bonus content creation
  • Build a modern portfolio with XSLT & GO and back to basics libraries that reduce the load, time, cost and maintenance of sites and software that don't require dynamical systems like react to function for the basic needs of fast, reliable and editable without breaking versions and lost dev time.

Case Study

Client Venture

  • Unschool Discoveries
  • Book Website
  • Bonus content for parents
  • Bonus content for kids
  • Behind the scenes building the universe and fandom

Challenge

  • Speed
  • Monetize platform culture that takes away brand ownership and paywalls audience without creator compensation
  • bloated software engineering practices

Solution

  • HTML basics
  • MD and MDX simplicity
  • Full ownership of content
  • Full copyright and publish rights
  • Ability to directly monetize client venture

Approach

  • Experimentation
  • Hugo for marketing and landing site
  • 11thy for bonus content creation
  • Self hosted podcast
  • Self hosted feed, newsletter
  • Self hosted video content
  • Self hosted paywall

Strategy Setting: Getting Back to Basics

  • Building a Simple. Durable. Search Crawl . Non-Obfuscated Site to build brand awareness.
/index.html
/unschooling/
    what-is-unschooling.html
    unschooling-vs-homeschooling.html
    unschooling-curriculum.html
/stories/
/memoir/
/lab/
/css/style.css
/images/
/sitemap.xml
/robots.txt

Now: To Actually Win “Unschooling” and gain awareness for "Unschool Discoveries"

You don’t win by publishing one page. You win by building a topic fortress.

Pillar Page

What Is Unschooling?

Supporting Cluster (Minimum 20 pages)

Unschooling vs Homeschooling

Unschooling Curriculum

Is Unschooling Legal?

Unschooling Laws by State

Unschooling High School

Unschooling and College Admissions

Unschooling Pros and Cons

How to Start Unschooling

Radical Unschooling

Famous Unschoolers

Unschooling Statistics

Unschooling Research Studies
  • Every page links back to the pillar.

Unschool Discoveries Ecosystem

Stories

Slice of Life

Memoir

The Deschooling Lab

Chi’Va

Book Collections

Not advice. Not “how to homeschool.” But lived experience.

PILLAR IDENTITY PAGE (1)
1. What Is Unschool Discoveries?

Your manifesto.
Not academic.
A declaration of freedom, curiosity, lived education.

This anchors brand identity.

THE STORY ENGINE (10 Pages)

These are evergreen story hubs. Each hub becomes dozens of individual posts.

2. Jungle Quests (Everyday Adventure Stories)

Grocery store navigation
Airport missions
Public transport puzzles
City scavenger hunts

3. Failure on Purpose

Stories of trying, failing, retrying
Burnt bread
Broken inventions
Misread maps

4. Deep Dive Rabbit Holes

One obsession per story
Octopus camouflage
Medieval siege engines
Moss ecosystems
Cryptography puzzles

5. Nature is the Classroom

Creek days
Tree climbing physics
Mud architecture
Night sky navigation

4
6. The City as a Living Textbook

Museum free days
Street performers
Construction sites
Library labyrinths

7. Micro-Mastery Stories

Learning to tie knots
Learning to barter
Learning to cook one perfect dish

8. Quiet Wonder Stories

Slow mornings
Rain listening
Watching ants for 40 minutes

9. Sibling Collaboration Stories

Shared experiments
Arguments resolved through projects

10. Solo Quest Stories

A child choosing their own adventure

11. Worldschool Diaries

Markets in Mexico
Trains in Europe
Desert roads
Coastal towns

4
CULTURE & IDENTITY (6 Pages)

These pages subtly rank for unschooling terms without being preachy.

12. Kids Who Never Go to School

Story compilation hub.

13. A Day Without a Bell

Narrative depiction of a full unschooled day.

14. Freedom Looks Like This

Short vignette collection.

15. Learning in the Wild

Micro-stories of spontaneous learning.

16. Making Mistakes Without Shame

Failure as ritual.

17. The Myth of Falling Behind

Told through stories of nonlinear growth.

MEMOIR SECTION (5 Pages)

This is where your Substack migration lives.

18. Parent Slice of Life

Short reflections.

19. The Deschooling Years

Narrative essays.

20. Conversations at the Park

Dialogues with curious strangers.

21. The Day We Said No to School

Origin story.

22. Watching Mastery Emerge

Long-form reflective essays.

THE DESCHOOLING LAB (4 Pages)

This becomes your philosophical engine.

23. The Deschooling Lab

Exploration hub.

24. Chi’Va

Dedicated page explaining concept and linking outward.

25. Self-Directed Learning Experiments

Documented experiments.

26. What Happens When You Remove Coercion?

Thought piece backed by lived examples.

COLLECTION & BOOK PIPELINE (4 Pages)
27. Story Collections

Organized by theme.

28. Most Loved Stories

Driven by analytics.

29. Field Notes Archive

Short-form story fragments.

30. Upcoming Book Projects

Use this URL pattern:

/stories/jungle-quest-grocery-store.html
/stories/failure-burnt-bread.html
/memoir/deschooling-year-one.html
/lab/what-happens-without-coercion.html
  • Transparent creative pipeline.

Growth

  • 30-page topical authority map
  • Design your “What Is Unschooling?” pillar page to outrank competitors
  • Structure internal linking like a moat

Next, do the following:

  • Design the exact internal linking architecture
  • in /unschooling/
  • Draft the manifesto page
  • Publish your first “Grocery Store Jungle Quest” story
  • Or help you craft the Chi’Va positioning page
  • Unschooling vs Homeschooling
  • Unschooling vs Worldschooling
  • What Is Worldschooling?
  • What Is Homeschooling?
  • Define tone for the bonus sections: unschooling, lab, stories, memoir
